listening.title: Listening: Hobbies and skills
listening.transcript: I can play the guitar and I can sing well. My sister can draw, but she can't swim. We can both cook simple meals.

questions.question: What can the speaker do?
questions.explanation: "I can play the guitar and I can sing well."

questions.question: The sister can ___ but can't swim.
questions.explanation: "My sister can draw, but she can't swim."

listening.title: Listening: A polite phone call
listening.transcript: Can I speak to Mr. Brown, please? Can you tell him I will be late? Can he call me back this afternoon?

questions.question: What does the caller want Mr. Brown to know?
questions.explanation: "Can you tell him I will be late?"
